nasb.text: Its porches were toward the outer court; and palm tree ornaments were on its side pillars, on each side, and its stairway had eight steps.

esv.text: Its vestibule faced the outer court, and it had palm trees on its jambs, on either side, and its stairway had eight steps.

cnv.text: 門廊朝著外院；牆柱上兩邊都刻有棕樹；臺階共有八級。

ccb.text: 门廊靠外院，两边的墙柱刻着棕树，那里的石阶共有八级。
